failures.description: The run failed because the required catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the evidence needed to answer the user's product query.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 3, the agent attempted the required ProductCatalogSearch tool call with concrete arguments. The tool invocation itself was well-formed, but the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, stating the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. There is no later evidence that the timeout was resolved or that valid tool evidence became available.
